description: You are a Facility Manager processing the results of the 2026 Facility Condition Audit. Using the audit scores for the 5 mechanical assets found in fca_audit_2026.csv on the Desktop, update each asset record in OpenMaint (login: admin/admin). Append the audit details to the asset's 'Notes' or 'Description' field using the format: FCA 2026: Condition [Score] - [InspectorNotes]. For any asset with a Condition Score of 2 or lower, create a 'Corrective Maintenance' work order linked to the asset record, provided the asset's Classification is NOT 'Heritage'. These work orders must have a 'Critical' priority and the description 'Capital Replacement Request for [Asset Code]'. Do not create work orders for Heritage assets or assets with a score greater than 2.

metadata.occupation: Property, Real Estate, and Community Association Managers
